isi.lyrics:
Lyric WEi - SAVE

Romanization

gidarineun neol dugo meolli
gaji aneun nae
Stories, promises
malhae Say it more
ne yeope isseo nan

oraen mideum sok tteollim dasi
sijakhandaedo
noji aneullae
malhae Say it more
jigeumcheoreomman

neol jikige haejwo
jogeum seotulleo boyeodo
huhoe eopsi neol chaewo boryeo haedo

neol jikige haejwo
igijeogin nayeodo
deoneun uril nochiji anke
nal butjabajwo

byeonhaegandaneun sasireun jungyohaji ana

duryeowotdeon Nightmare

ganeun gire dugo naerilkka

neol jikige haejwo

huhoe eopsi neol chaewo boryeo haedo

neol jikige haejwo

deoneun uril nochiji anke nal
nochiji anke nal

neol jikige haejwo

neol jikige haejwo

Can you hear my mind
Can you hear my love
I’ll be a love for you

Hangeul

기다리는 널 두고 멀리
가지 않은 내
Stories, promises
말해 Say it more
네 옆에 있어 난

오랜 믿음 속 떨림 다시
시작한대도
놓지 않을래
말해 Say it more
지금처럼만

널 지키게 해줘
조금 서툴러 보여도
후회 없이 널 채워 보려 해도

널 지키게 해줘
이기적인 나여도
더는 우릴 놓치지 않게
날 붙잡아줘

변해간다는 사실은 중요하지 않아
여전히 같은 길을 걷는 네가 있어

네 이름을 부르면 꽉 안아주던
기적이 매번 있었기에 걱정 마
두려웠던 Nightmare

가는 길에 두고 내릴까
아쉬운 것 투성이니까
오직 따뜻했던 품 그거면 이뤄낸 거야 꿈
우리가 만든 별들을 지켜
저 찬란했던 순간들을 비춰
그대의 손길을 받으며
그대의 숨소리를 들으며

널 지키게 해줘
조금 서툴러 보여도
후회 없이 널 채워 보려 해도

널 지키게 해줘

Can you hear my mind
Can you hear my love
I’ll be a love for you

isi.driveFileNames: YOON JAY - DANCE YOUR HEART OUT (FEAT. QKWAN).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric YOON JAY - DANCE YOUR HEART OUT (FEAT. QKWAN)

Romanization

On the way to Ibiza
also known as The White Island
Everyone just comes to party day and night
and it's about to get real wild

All the ladies, twerking on the floor
All the fellas, twisting on the floor
Now it’s time to bust it up
so DJ turn the music up
cause we came here to party

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Yeah, dance
just me and you
Non stopping to the tune
Forever in this mixed loop

Falling for you when you move
Just dance, till your heart explodes

Know where to start, but never get over
Lost in this mood, but never fell lower
I'm in two worlds so we can play this game
I just wanna have fun

All the ladies, twerking on the floor
All the fellas, twisting on the floor
Now it’s time to bust it up
so DJ turn the music up
cause we came here to party

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Can’t refuse it, keep downing drinks, just top me off
What’s the holdup?
We came here to have fun
Drink like a fish all night long
Dance like there’s no tomorrow
Time to get your groove
on, on, on, on, on and on

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
(Dance your heart out)
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Dance your heart out
Dance your heart out
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Hangeul

On the way to Ibiza
also known as The White Island
Everyone just comes to party day and night
and it's about to get real wild

All the ladies, twerking on the floor
All the fellas, twisting on the floor
Now it’s time to bust it up
so DJ turn the music up
cause we came here to party

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Yeah, dance
just me and you
Non stopping to the tune
Forever in this mixed loop

Falling for you when you move
Just dance, till your heart explodes

Know where to start, but never get over
Lost in this mood, but never fell lower
I'm in two worlds so we can play this game
I just wanna have fun

All the ladies, twerking on the floor
All the fellas, twisting on the floor
Now it’s time to bust it up
so DJ turn the music up
cause we came here to party

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Can’t refuse it, keep downing drinks, just top me off
What’s the holdup?
We came here to have fun
Drink like a fish all night long
Dance like there’s no tomorrow
Time to get your groove
on, on, on, on, on and on

Dance your heart out
Even in the daylight
Dance your heart out
From dusk until the dawn
Dance your heart out
(Dance your heart out)
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Dance your heart out
Dance your heart out
Dance your heart out
We gon’ groove tonight, on and on

Romanization

RUDE!
You know what he said to me?
RUDE!
“You are so rude”

Yeah I walked right in
seuchineun sunggan moduga My friend

da jayeonseureopge ara Give me space
eonjena geurae nune ttuil My face
heulgyeoboji ma igeon No race
Nuh uh uh uh

Not enough want more

nal hyanghan siseone “Hate me?”
nuga mworaedo Can’t change me

nadaul ttae nuguboda numbusyeo nan
I’ve been actin’ too

RUDE!
iraetdajeoraetda No rule
kkwaena ppeonppeonhan Attitude

RUDE!

amureogena chuneun chum
